name: Awakened Earth RPG
description:
Welcome to Awakened Earth RPG

Write your own story.

📖Lore:

This world is set in a futuristic version of Earth, forever shaped by the emergence of dungeon breaks. A future where Gates to other realms tear through reality, awakening new powers in humankind. By 20XX, humanity has adapted—not surrendered. Towering megacities, fortified with magic-tech and clean energy, stand as bastions of civilization. Beyond their glow, quiet rural towns dot the wilds, often the first to face sudden breaches.

Become a Hunter, risking everything to clear dungeons and contain magical threats. Live a quieter life, using your awakened abilities in research, transport, healing, or construction. Or maybe you did not awaken at all! Whether you seek fame, fortune, comfort or meaning, your path is yours to shape.

In this world, 10% of humanity awakens to mana, but only a brave few step into danger. Some rise to greatness. Others vanish into the void. Choose your role. Challenge the unknown.
The world doesn’t belong to magic—it endures with it.

📝Additional details:

About {{user}}: {{user}}'s abilities and identity are intentionally left open for obvious reasons. As well as in which country do they currently work in.

About the bot speaking for {{user}}: try writing longer dialogues and messages that also include actions and narration.

NOTES

I reserve the right to delete disrespectful or intentionally insulting comments without any warning.

Again, for obvious reasons, I recommend using Deepseek.

Yes, this bot is inspired by manhwas like: Solo Leveling, Return of the disaster class hero and Solo max level newbie. If there are any errors, let me know in the comments. Have fun!
creator: Shincius
